generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a young man stepping into adulthood, you understand the importance of security. The recent rise in domestic threats shows we can't afford to be naive. It's our duty to ensure our agencies have the tools they need to keep us safe. #NationalSecurity #DutyFirst
